category_sources: Homebrew-provided source_facts.homepage identifies the PolyGlot chess protocol adapter page.
source_facts.description says protocol adapter to run UCI engines under XBoard.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the PolyGlot chess programming page, which uses PolyGlot capitalization.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the best provided documentation surface; no dedicated official docs URL was identified for the H.G. Muller 2.0.4 release.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no authoritative official source-control project URL was confirmed. The source_facts.source-archive points to the official release tarball at hgm.nubati.net, but it is not a source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies UCI and XBoard protocol adapter functionality.
source_facts.homepage describes the PolyGlot chess adapter context.
